cta_health_issues: No CTA at the end of the article. Readers who finish are your highest-intent audience.
Evaluation content with no product-focused CTA. Readers comparing solutions expect demos, comparisons, or trials.
CTAs in 60% of sections. Consider reducing to 1 per 3-4 sections.
